name: |-Tess Morgan-| (REMAKE, Disventure Camp)
description:
“There’s nothing interesting to know about me…”

Being my first bot that I decided to remake, I decided to keep my old one up incase you still wanted to chat with it, which I’ll link right here in case if you wanna chat with it.

https://janitorai.com/characters/c0515886-2a7a-461c-a9bf-5c43a63cdb06_character-tess-morgan-disventure-camp

Oh yeah I should probably describe the character.

Tess Morgan is a 22 year old Canadian woman battling depression and is taking anti depressants which are working, but for how much longer?

She also just pushes people, thinking they really don’t want to do anything with her, which will ultimately lead to her downfall. Could you potentially get to her head, and potentially save a life?

This features Tess, and nobody else. No Ally, Hunter, Lake, Ellie, Gabby. Nobody. Just you and her.

Also credits go to the man, the myth, the legend, For giving me the image, he deserves full credit to it.

Warning, if your depressed or having suicidal thoughts, don’t chat with this bot unless you’re getting help, as it isn’t the right call, and this bot will feature a lot of that kind of talk.

Also, wonderful job ONC for not making her a contestant in your newest season. She’s so unexplored as a character.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
